arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta takes on new Arsenal role in unique preparation for Champions League clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has installed giant speakers at Arsenal's training ground ahead of their Champions League clash with Croatian side Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: Sesko and Osimhen deals agreed as £52m star signs in dream Arsenal window
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi is a player football.london understands Arsenal are already working to bring in for the summer, so reaching an agreement before the end of this window would make sense. Arsenal signing a striker this winter transfer window no longer appears to be the stuff of dreams.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes William Saliba return promise ahead of Arsenal clash with Man City
arts.sum: William Saliba has been confirmed to be ready to return before Arsenal take on Manchester City, but will miss the clash with Dinamo Zagreb. On Saliba, Arteta was asked about whether he could be back for Manchester City and he replied, "Yes, we hope so."

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Dinamo Zagreb, Saliba injury latest and Arsenal transfer search
arts.sum: He provided the latest team news and even the status of William Saliba ahead of the match with Manchester City in more than a week's time. My thinking is, let's do what we have to do first, which is always difficult because we're talking about the Champions League and, I mean, we managed to do that, obviously we'll have the best ideas on the table to make the right decision.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could set new club winning record in Champions League clash with Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Arsenal can set a new club Champions League record when they welcome Dinamo Zagreb to the Emirates for Wednesday's penultimate league phase match.

arts.ttl: Arsenal show firm interest in Cunha - Wednesday gossip
arts.sum: Arsenal show firm interest in Matheus Cunha, Chelsea to hold more talks over Alejandro Garnacho move, Manchester United prioritise signing a left-wing back, plus more.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest make Wolves striker Matheus Cunha their top January target in push for Champions League qualification amid interest from Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY SAMI MOKBEL: Forest are ready to enter the market for a new attacker this month as they look to make a serious push for a top four finish.

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to follow Manchester City transfer example after Matheus Cunha developments
arts.sum: Charles Watts fears that Arsenal have "missed the boat" for a January move for Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha, in spite of recent intriguing developments.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues new Bukayo Saka injury update as Arsenal return plan takes huge step forward
arts.sum: "Yes, he needs to," replied Arteta when asked by reporters if Saka should take time off. Mikel Arteta has given a fresh update on Bukayo Saka with the Arsenal star currently recovering from a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal ‘make contact’ with representatives of Wolverhampton Wanderers star with 14 G/A
arts.sum: Arsenal have touched base with the representatives of Wolverhampton Wanderers attacker Matheus Cunha, according to reports. It’s no secret that the Gunners are in need of a striker as the look to try and snatch the lead away from Premier League leaders Liverpool.
